title: Technical Accountant (Reinsurance Operation)
description:
about the company

Our client, a leading global insurance organization with a strong market presence in the Asia-Pacific region, known for providing comprehensive risk management solutions and operational excellence within the specialized reinsurance sector.

about the job

In this position as a Technical Accountant, you will step into a pivotal operational role based in Singapore, where you will drive the efficiency and integrity of reinsurance programs while collaborating with senior regional stakeholders. You will be expected to manage the end-to-end administration of reinsurance portfolios, including treaty contract implementation and financial statement oversight.

  • Facilitate the renewal process for treaty reinsurance through strategic negotiation, placement and necessary internal approvals.

  • Oversee technical data collation and performance analytics, including catastrophe modeling and retention reviews to ensure robust protection.

  • Lead regulatory compliance efforts by managing mandatory submissions to industry authorities and ensuring contract certainty standards.

  • Drive continuous improvement by supporting system enhancements, automation initiatives and resolving cross functional operational challenges.

skills and experience required

  • At least 3+ years of professional experience specifically within reinsurance operations, treaty or facultative management.

  • Strong technical knowledge of various treaty and facultative reinsurance structures and renewal statistics.

  • Proficient analytical capabilities with high competency in data management tools like MS Excel and PowerPoint.

  • Familiarity with industry-specific reporting requirements, rating agency considerations and catastrophe modeling data.

  • Excellent communication and coordination skills with the ability to work effectively in a team-oriented, multi-stakeholder environment.

Please click on the 'apply' button to apply online.

(EA:94C3609/R132534)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
